notes: Tessier et al. 2024 JAMA Network Open; prospective cohort N=92383 over 28 years; >7g/day olive oil associated with 28% lower dementia-related death; Harvard study; gold-standard evidence; re-confirmed 2026-04-09
NIA official summary of the Tessier 2024 JAMA study; secondary source but from US government health authority; supports the primary finding; re-confirmed 2026-04-09
Press release about animal study (mice); EurekAlert is not a peer-reviewed source; study itself (Aging Cell DOI 10.1111/acel.13076) is valid but this URL should not be a reference
RCT in mild cognitive impairment patients showing EVOO enhances blood-brain barrier function; published in Nutrients (MDPI); peer-reviewed; relevant to EVOO and cognitive health claims
PMC review on EVOO intake and cognitive decline; secoiridoid oleuropein mechanism; peer-reviewed; supports neuroprotective claims

Alkhalifa et al. 2024 Int J Mol Sci; comprehensive review of cellular, animal, and clinical EVOO studies in Alzheimer's disease; covers amyloid-beta, tau, neuroinflammation, BBB mechanisms; new reference 2026-04-09
